name: Infinity Mijinion
description:
Mijinion is a minor antagonist from Megaman X6. He is a Reploid created by the researcher Gate as head of a weapon center to test pilot manned weaponry due to Mijinion's high processing abilities but because of his blatant disregard for others even during tests, he was killed from a sabotaged test-run but later revived by Gate as one of the Nightmare Investigators.

His appearance is based off the daphnia water flea even down to being one of the smallest Reploids, he has a fittingly small body with a round torso, a tail, and a small head featuring a snout-like structure. Large portions of his body, such as his legs, arms, and belly, are transparent and filled with a gelatinous green substance.

As a Reploid capable of high speed processing, his form can become gelatinous to split apart to create duplicates that operate independently as well as using this to create dangerous bubble projectiles. From his arms he can also fire small laser projectiles that can freely change directions.
creator: AnimeMan1993
